import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(all)

  let a_str = match parts.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("missing A")
  end

  let b_str = match parts.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("missing B")
  end

  let s_str = match parts.get(2)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("missing S")
  end

  let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid A")
  end

  let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid B")
  end

  let stride = match string.parse_int(s_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid S")
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut current = a

  while current < b
    if first
      result = "#{current}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{current}"
    end
    current = current + stride
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
